name: PowerIterFreq3
description: Subspace iteration with frequency 3, doing 2 power iterations per update. Random orthogonal init.
author: Kimi K2.5
result: Explored multiple approaches: Jacobi-like incremental diagonalization (too slow), Oja's online PCA (poor convergence), momentum-accelerated subspace iteration (moderate results). Best approach: Subspace iteration with frequency 3 and 2 power iterations per update, but only one QR after second matmul. Key insights: 1) Random orthogonal initialization converges faster than identity, 2) 2 power iterations per update provides good convergence vs computation tradeoff, 3) Frequency 3 balances between update cost and tracking accuracy.
